data.body:
[9/29 (Mon) Temporary Maintenance Notice]

Temporary maintenance will be carried out during the schedule below to improve game performance and stability. 

To ensure safe data storage and maintenance procedures, please make sure to end or suspend any ongoing gameplay, such as Total Assault, before the maintenance begins. 

- Schedule: 9/29 (Mon) 6:00 AM – 8:00 AM(UTC) 
- Effect: Unable to enter the game  

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3161344

[9/29 Temporary Maintenance End]

Today's temporary maintenance has ended, Sensei.

➡️Compensation: Pyroxene x240 (Compensation will be available in your mailbox until 10/6 (Mon) 2:59 PM UTC) 

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3161344

#BlueArchive
